text: The relationship between these two events can vary depending on the type of cytokines or immune cells present in a certain tissue type, as some combinations induce cell death while others could be protective of cells. Nevertheless, inflammatory cytokines and leukocytes have been repeatedly noted to be able to enhance cell death across a variety of tissues throughout the body (Haanen & Vermes, 1995; van den Oever, Raterman, Nurmohamed, & Simsek, 2010; Göbel, et al., 2010).
